Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arb Award; Index
Off Calendar Jul-27-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD on behalf of itself and on behalf of CARPENTERS LOCAL UNION 405 PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.

APPEARANCES: Ezekiel D. Carder, Esq. of Weinberg, Roger & Rosenfeld 510/337-1001 for petitioner & moving party; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court granted the matter as petitioner provided a timely proof of service as requested in the tentative ruling. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Rhonda Aquilina, CSR 956
